base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fireball_projectile_rotate — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1985 super mario bros. flame sprite rotates 90° per frame to appear spinning. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame rotating-fireball cycle — flame sprite rotates 90° per frame to appear spinning; 8×8 NES-tile sized
